name: Embriago Coffee
subtext: Serving exceptional coffee and warm vibes in the Lower East Side.

featured.text: A very cozy coffee shop with a pleasant atmosphere and excellent service.
featured.author: Local Guide

featured.text: Classy joint, good place to sit outside & enjoy a cold brew on a warm day.
featured.author: Google Reviewer

featured.text: Highly recommend the einspanner latte which is delicious.
featured.author: Coffee Enthusiast

featured.text: The table by the window is perfect for people watching.
featured.author: Neighborhood Regular
